LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.EnablePerso: When enabled, AI dynamically generates psychological states (Thoughts) based on game events and colonist conditions.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.ShowNotific: Display a notification on screen when AI generates a new psychological state.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.ShowLabelPr: Display a "RimMind" prefix before psychological state labels to distinguish AI-generated Thoughts from vanilla ones.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.ThoughtCoun: Thought count per evaluation (μ = {0}, Poisson sampling, result 1~3)
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.AIDecidesDu: Let AI decide each Thought's duration
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.AIDurationH: AI outputs duration_hours (1~24) in JSON, applied automatically
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.DailyEval.D: Automatically evaluate colonist personality each day, generating psychological states.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.InjuryTrigg: Trigger personality evaluation when a colonist is injured.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.SkillTrigge: Trigger personality evaluation when a colonist levels up a skill.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.IncidentTri: Trigger personality evaluation when a major colony incident occurs.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.DeathTrigge: Trigger personality evaluation for other colonists when someone dies.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.RequestExpi: Personality evaluation requests that don't receive a response within this time are automatically cancelled.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.ShapingHist: Keep the last N personality shaping vote records for AI evaluation reference.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.UI.DescriptionLabel: Personality description (background, referenced by AI evaluation)
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.UI.AINarrative: AI recent narrative (read-only, updated daily by AI)
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.UI.NarrativeEmpty: (Not yet evaluated - AI will fill in automatically after running for a while)
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.UI.BioTab.Label: Personality
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.UI.BioTab.NotEvaluat: Not yet evaluated - AI will fill in personality narrative automatically after running for a while.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.EvalInstructi: Based on the above information, select the applicable personality states for today, generating exactly {0} thoughts.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.JsonFormatDir: Output the following JSON format directly, without any other text:
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.DescHint: specific description (20 chars max, third person)
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.NarrativeHint: within 50 chars, describe the colonist's recent psychological changes
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Role: [Role] You are a RimWorld colonist personality evaluator, responsible for generating psychological states based on game conditions.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Goal: [Goal] Based on the colonist's current state, personality profile, and trigger reason, generate Thoughts and narrative that reflect the character's psychology.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Proces:
[Process]
1. Read the colonist's full state (mood, health, skills, traits, backstory)
2. Reference personality profile and player shaping history
3. If there is a trigger reason, prioritize reflecting that event's psychological impact
4. Generate Thoughts (type + label + description + intensity)
5. Generate narrative (describing recent psychological changes)
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Constr:
[Constraint]
- label ≤8 chars, description ≤20 chars (third person)
- intensity range -3~+3
- Thoughts should reflect the colonist's real state, do not fabricate
- narrative ≤50 chars
- Do not break the fourth wall
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Exampl: [Example]\nInput: Mood 35%, just severely injured in combat, trait: Tough\nOutput: {"thoughts":[{"type":"state","label":"Enduring pain","description":"Severely wounded but resolute","intensity":2}],"narrative":"Despite the agony, they grit their teeth and refuse to let comrades worry."}
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Output: [Output] Only return the following JSON format, nothing else:\n{"thoughts":[{"type":"state","label":"...","description":"...","intensity":0}],"narrative":"..."}
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Prompt.System.Fallba: [Fallback] If unable to evaluate, return {"thoughts":[],"narrative":"Normal state, no significant psychological fluctuation."}.
LanguageData.RimMind.Personality.Settings.EnableShapi: When enabled, AI proposes new personality traits during evaluation, and the player can vote to reinforce, suppress, or ignore them.
